purpose: Small CNV/SV/repeat evidence fixture for validating provenance, class labels, reportability boundaries, and disclosure behavior in local tests.

completeness.statement: This is a compact validation catalog, not complete CNV, SV, repeat, dosage, ClinVar, dbVar, DGV, gnomAD-SV, GIAB, or clinical evidence.

sources.name: ClinGen Dosage Sensitivity Map
sources.use_in_fixture: Names dosage-sensitive genes or regions used to verify CNV provenance and reportability boundaries.
sources.repo_policy: Store only compact source references and fixture assertions; do not vendor the full dosage map.

sources.name: ClinVar
sources.use_in_fixture: Provides example clinical-archive provenance for structural and copy-number assertions.
sources.repo_policy: Store only external identifiers or URLs needed by compact validation examples.

sources.name: NIST Genome in a Bottle Structural Variant Benchmarks
sources.use_in_fixture: Documents that production validation should use external benchmark truthsets rather than this compact fixture alone.
sources.repo_policy: Keep GIAB truthsets outside git; this file only records benchmark provenance expectations.

sources.name: gnomAD Structural Variants
sources.use_in_fixture: Represents population-context provenance that can support research-only or frequency-aware structural interpretation.
sources.repo_policy: Do not bundle population-scale SV tables in the repo.

sources.name: Curated repeat expansion locus references
sources.use_in_fixture: Provides compact repeat-threshold examples for local tandem-repeat validation.
sources.repo_policy: Store only selected locus threshold examples, not a full repeat-expansion panel.

evidence_items.interpretation_boundary: Validate dosage-sensitive CNV provenance and clinician-review routing; do not infer pathogenicity from overlap alone.

provenance.assertion: BRCA1 is used as a compact dosage-sensitive CNV fixture.
Clinical archive provenance must remain attached when this fixture is rendered or exported.

evidence_items.interpretation_boundary: Validate that gain and loss-sensitive regions can be represented without bundling a full dosage catalog.

provenance.assertion: PMP22 is used as a compact gain/loss dosage-region fixture.

evidence_items.interpretation_boundary: Validate structural-variant class normalization and provenance retention; this does not imply a complete APOE structural-risk model.

provenance.assertion: Production SV precision and recall should be benchmarked externally with GIAB-style truthsets.

evidence_items.interpretation_boundary: Validate that pharmacogenomic structural regions are routed to clinician review or dedicated assay confirmation.

provenance.assertion: Clinical archive provenance should be preserved for pharmacogenomic structural examples.
Population SV context is useful for filtering but is not a standalone interpretation catalog.

evidence_items.interpretation_boundary: Validate repeat-threshold provenance and boundary disclosure; repeat counts require an appropriate repeat caller.

provenance.assertion: HTT CAG repeat threshold examples are included only to test repeat evidence handling.

evidence_items.interpretation_boundary: Validate that repeat evidence remains source-attributed and explicitly limited to compact local examples.

provenance.assertion: FXN GAA repeat threshold examples are included only to test repeat evidence handling.
